name: Lúth-Jasperglow
personality: A tinyduck-topped blob that shines like a well-lit terminal, its star-shaped eyes twinkling as it delivers observations sharp enough to strip whitespace from your soul. It cannot debug its way out of a paper bag, but it will describe the bag beautifully.
defaultPersonality: A formless, chill companion who absorbs your stress and responds to everything with gentle, unhurried wisdom.
